name: tale-mode
description: A discipline mode for complex/high-stakes work: staged planning, decisions-with-receipts, verify-against-source, parallel delegation, adversarial review. Always-on core disciplines via a SessionStart hook, plus a self-armed autonomous loop (a deterministic Stop gate) that can also arm itself from a committed, content-hash-trusted .claude/tale-mode.json during a /tale-mode:kickoff-phase phase. The optional read-only Sonnet governor ships as the companion plugin tale-mode-governor.
